title: The Best Apps Start with the Best Feedback
excerpt:

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re proud to share that several spot-nik apps were recently recognized with awards from monday.com.

This acknowledgment was earned not just by our team, but by every user suggestion, question, and “wouldn’t it be great if…” comment that has helped shape how our apps meet your needs.

We’re committed to continuing building tools that make monday.com even more powerful for teams like yours.

If you haven’t tried our apps yet (or haven’t checked them out recently), we’d love for you to test them out and tell us what you think. Your feedback directly shapes what comes next. www.spot-nik.com

SM award1414×1414 153 KB

SF award1448×1448 156 KB

Inventory award1448×1448 144 KB
